content: Firebase two-project setup: create separate Firebase projects for staging and production in console.firebase.google.com. For Android: place google-services.json in flavor/build-type source directories. Recommended: app/src/debug/google-services.json (staging Firebase) and app/src/release/google-services.json (production Firebase). Apply plugin: com.google.gms.google-services. For iOS: place GoogleService-Info.plist in Xcode target per scheme. Each Firebase project gets its own FCM sender ID and APNs cert. Two-project config prevents staging notifications from going to production users.
